recruit_soldier.title: Recruit a Villager Recruit soldier unit (Villager Recruits mod — give them a weapon)

recruit_squad.title: Build a squad of 6 Villager Recruits (all 6 unit types)

subtitle.text: The kingdom you build needs defenders. You cannot defend it alone.

description: Villager Recruits adds 6 unit types that can be commanded in squads.
Each unit needs a weapon to fight — give them what they need.
Unit types: Soldiers, Archers, Cavalry, Medics, Mages, and Siege units.
Each has a specific combat role in the squad formation system.
You have been surviving alone or in small groups since Ch01.
The kingdom is the answer to survival at scale.
The army is the answer to what that scale faces.
The Wither Storm at X:0 Z:0 is not solved by one person.
It is survived by a collective that knows what it is.
→ Build a full squad of 6 units [check]
